claim: SOX9 plays a central role in astrocyte biology.

claim: Conditional deletion of SOX9 in the embryonic mouse spinal cord leads to a corresponding increase in neurons.

claim: In the adult brain, SOX9 expression becomes largely restricted to astrocytes.

claim: In the adult brain, SOX9 serves as a reliable marker for identifying astrocytes across multiple brain regions.
